description: Google (Gemini API) SSE streaming with inlineData (base64) output mapped to v3 `file` parts. Handcrafted contract fixture validating file part emission and finish usage/reason mapping.

source.notes: Handcrafted fixture because upstream AI SDK does not ship Google `*.chunks.txt` stream captures. Uses Gemini SSE (`alt=sse`) style with `[DONE]`. Includes a tiny 1x1 PNG base64 payload.
